Sending: M503
echo:  G21    ; Units in mm (mm)
echo:; Filament settings: Disabled
echo:  M200 S0 D1.75
echo:; Steps per unit:
echo: M92 X80.00 Y80.00 Z400.00 E424.90
echo:; Maximum feedrates (units/s):
echo:  M203 X500.00 Y500.00 Z5.00 E30.00
echo:; Maximum Acceleration (units/s2):
echo:  M201 X4000.00 Y4000.00 Z4000.00 E4000.00
echo:; Acceleration (units/s2): P<print_accel> R<retract_accel> T<travel_accel>
echo:  M204 P2500.00 R2500.00 T2500.00
echo:; Advanced: B<min_segment_time_us> S<min_feedrate> T<min_travel_feedrate> J<junc_dev>
echo:  M205 B20000.00 S0.00 T0.00 J0.10
echo:; Home offset:
echo:  M206 X50.00 Y50.00 Z0.00
echo:; Auto Bed Leveling:
echo:  M420 S1 Z10.00
echo:  G29 W I0 J0 Z0.34375
echo:  G29 W I1 J0 Z0.36975
echo:  G29 W I2 J0 Z0.34875
echo:  G29 W I3 J0 Z0.16375
echo:  G29 W I0 J1 Z0.17675
echo:  G29 W I1 J1 Z0.13725
echo:  G29 W I2 J1 Z0.08975
echo:  G29 W I3 J1 Z-0.02575
echo:  G29 W I0 J2 Z0.03725
echo:  G29 W I1 J2 Z0.00875
echo:  G29 W I2 J2 Z-0.01425
echo:  G29 W I3 J2 Z-0.10825
echo:  G29 W I0 J3 Z-0.18025
echo:  G29 W I1 J3 Z-0.18375
echo:  G29 W I2 J3 Z-0.16125
echo:  G29 W I3 J3 Z-0.13325
echo:; Material heatup parameters:
echo:  M145 S0 H200.00 B60.00 F0
echo:  M145 S1 H230.00 B70.00 F0
echo:; PID settings:
echo:  M301 P17.10 I1.39 D52.79
echo:  M304 P54.86 I10.06 D199.38
echo:; Power-Loss Recovery:
echo:  M413 S1
echo:; Z-Probe Offset (mm):
echo:  M851 X-24.25 Y-15.00 Z-1.61
echo:; Stepper driver current:
echo:  M906 X550 Y550 Z800
echo:  M906 T0 E600
echo:; Hybrid Threshold:
echo:  M913 X100 Y100 Z3
echo:  M913 T0 E30
echo:; Driver stepping mode:
echo:  M569 S1 X Y Z
echo:  M569 S1 T0 E
Input Shaping:

M593 Y F40.00 D0.15
echo:; Filament load/unload lengths:
echo:  M603 L0.00 U100.00
